dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses 12-day percent change (approximated with 'returns' indicator in decimal scale: 0.01 = +1%, -0.01 = -1%). '10-day moving low/high' mapped to Donchian Channel 10-period equivalents (dc_lower for 10-day low, dc_upper for 10-day high). Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT since signal generates both long and short entries based on conditions. Exit conditions implemented as reversals per rule 8.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses 12-day percent change (approximated with 'returns' indicator in decimal scale: 0.01 = +1%, -0.01 = -1%). '10-day moving low/high' mapped to Donchian Channel 10-period equivalents (dc_lower for 10-day low, dc_upper for 10-day high). Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT since signal generates both long and short entries based on conditions. Exit conditions implemented as reversals per rule 8.

source_rule_text: Buy when 12-day percent change exceeds +1% and price is above the 10-day moving low; sell when 12-day percent change falls below -1% and price is below the 10-day moving high.
